steps.title: Move all terms to one side
steps.content: Start by subtracting $x-31$ from both sides: $$0=(x-a)(x-31)-(x-31)$$

steps.title: Identify the listed solutions
steps.content: By the zero product property, the solutions are $x=31$ and $x=a+1$. These are statements III and II, while statement I is not a solution. The answer is C.
